title: lantana camara f. varia
intro: Lantana camara f. varia, also known as the invasive shrub lantana or yellow button lantana, is a plant species in the verbena family native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lantana camara f. varia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Lantana camara f. varia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be dried and used in various herbal remedies.
